description: Credential update (Admin): shared id + missing-label rejections, read-only-field and empty-label rejections (ported to Go, strictest-wins), confirm gate, and the label PUT once confirmed.

cases.name: rejects non-positive credential_id
cases.expect_error: credential_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects read-only fields
cases.expect_error: Read-only fields are not accepted: id, last_decrypted

cases.name: rejects an empty label
cases.expect_error: label must be a non-empty string

cases.name: requires confirm before updating
cases.expect_error: This updates a Managed credential. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a Managed credential. Set confirm=true to proceed.
